# @pondoknusa/telegram

Telegram Bot API integration for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/telegram
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `3.1.0` |
| Source | [`packages/telegram`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/telegram) |
| Category | Other packages |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
